topic: Mamdani NYC mayor meta-prediction CP analysis
summary: CP currently at 0.90, threshold is 0.91. CP has been at 0.90 for 8 straight days since Sept 7. Was at 0.92-0.93 from Aug 31-Sept 6. Mamdani leads polls by ~18 points in 4-way race.
content:
CP History Analysis for post 38665 (underlying question):
- Current CP: 0.90 (as of Sept 14, 2025) - BELOW threshold of 0.91
- CP was at 0.92-0.93 from Aug 31 - Sept 6
- CP dropped to 0.90 on Sept 7 and has stayed there for 8 days
- Pattern: CP oscillates between 0.90 and 0.93, with 0.90 as a strong floor
- Over last 45 data points (Aug 1-Sept 14), only ~27% above 0.91

Election fundamentals:
- Mamdani won Democratic primary June 24
- 4-way general election: Mamdani (D, ~43%), Cuomo (I, ~25%), Sliwa (R, ~14%), Adams (I, ~10%)
- Mamdani leads by ~18 points in poll aggregates
- Anti-Mamdani vote split 3 ways
- Walden dropped out Sept 2
- Adams announced Sept 5 he's staying in
- General election Nov 4, 2025
